Module chariot
Package chariot.model

Interface Arena

All Known Implementing Classes:
Arena.Finished, Arena.Ongoing, Arena.TeamFinished, Arena.TeamOngoing, Arena.TeamUpcoming, Arena.Upcoming
public sealed interface Arena permits Arena.Upcoming, Arena.Ongoing, Arena.Finished, Arena.TeamUpcoming, Arena.TeamOngoing, Arena.TeamFinished
